pages.text: Drop items into the forge interior, or feed them through an $(l)Item Port$(). Once the forge passes their melting point they liquefy:$(br2)- Nugget: $(l)16 mB$()$(br)- Ingot: $(l)144 mB$()$(br)- Raw ore: $(l)288 mB$() — *double yield!*$(br)- Block: $(l)1,296 mB$()
pages.title: Items to Metal

pages.text: Living creatures inside a hot forge are $(l)scalded$(), dripping fluid with every tick of damage. Most mobs render down to blood.$(br2)Some render down to... other things. Experiment respectfully.
pages.title: A Warning About Mobs
